subcodes.first_line: O servant of the Sacred Threshold! Thy letter dated the twenty-ninth of Dhi'l-Hijjih 1328 was received; the other letters, in the course of transmittal [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای بنده آستان مقدس نامه بیست و نهم ذی حجه ۱۳۲۸ رسید و نامه های دیگر بواسطه سفر
subcodes.subjects: @mystical themes, @empty learning; false spirituality, @alteration of the divine will [bada], @business; financial; property matters, @interpretation of words and passages in scripture
